caption: The video captures a scene on a calm body of water, likely a river or harbor, under clear skies. A large ship dominates the right side of the frame, with its massive hull and anchor points visible. To the left, a smaller tugboat is seen maneuvering near the ship, possibly assisting it with docking or navigation. The tugboat is equipped with various equipment and has a distinctive red and black color scheme. In the background, a line of trees and land can be seen, suggesting the proximity to a shoreline. The water appears relatively still, reflecting the tranquility of the setting. The overall atmosphere suggests a routine maritime operation, with the tugboat playing a crucial role in guiding the larger vessel.
